sections.title: Fall Protection Pretask JHA
sections.html:
Task Description: ________________________________________________________________________________

Pre-Task Hazard Identification Checklist:

☐ Unprotected edges/holes

☐ Leading edge work

☐ Roofing activities

☐ Scaffolding operations

☐ Aerial lift operations

☐ Steel erection

☐ Excavation/trenching

☐ Wall openings

☐ Hoist areas

☐ Formwork/reinforcing steel

Required PPE Checklist:

☐ Full body harness

☐ Shock-absorbing lanyard

☐ Self-retracting lifeline (SRL)

☐ Anchor point (5000 lbs)

☐ Hard hat

☐ Safety glasses

☐ Work boots

☐ Gloves

sections.title: Fall Protection Pretask JHA (continued 2)
sections.html:
Step #

Task Step Description

Potential Hazard

Hazard Control Measure

Responsible Party

1

Inspect fall protection equipment

Using defective equipment

Inspect harness, lanyard, and anchor points before use. Remove defective equipment from service.

Employee

2

Identify anchor points

Inadequate anchor strength

Ensure anchor point can support 5,000 lbs per employee attached.

Competent Person

3

Don fall protection equipment

Improper fit

Adjust harness to fit snugly. Ensure D-ring is between shoulder blades.

Employee

4

Access work area

Slips, trips, falls

Maintain 3 points of contact on ladders. Keep walkways clear of debris.

Employee

5

Perform work at height

Fall to lower level

Remain tied off 100% of the time when exposed to fall hazard.

Employee

6

7

8

9

10
